rulings.Case Title: MARK JEROME EIRC TRUDGETT VS. TERESA CHECK CHI LAU TRUDGETT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or For Undertaking
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 07, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT TERESA TRUDGETT'S Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Or For Undertaking Hearing Required to address (1) evidence and authority establishing that Plaintiff is likely to be found to have interest in the property under Australian law in Australian dissolution proceedings; (2) whether this Court has subject matter jurisdiction over parties' marriage and characterization, distribution and award of property upon dissolution; (3) whether dissolution action has been filed (and served), and if so, does Australia have restraining orders similar to order appearing on FL-110, page 2, paragraph 3. = (501/REQ)
